Document:
# Slimes and Spiders
Slimes and spiders have no remarkable features, but will [color=cyan]infest the station[/color] from time to time regardless. Both will give chase and attack anything they see. - Slimes may [bold]deal extra cellular or poison damage[/bold], based upon their color. Water hurts them just as it would hurt a slime person. - Spiders have a venomous bite and can [bold]create webs[/bold] that are hard to move through, but are easily destroyed with a blade. They can also pry open doors, windoors, and airlocks.
